dimensions.notes: Mesh Z min is -3.0 because corner feet now span z=-3 to z=0 as flat cylinders (was dome-scaled-hemispheres, overhang removed). Mesh XY bbox 108 x 254.9 driven by widest shelf section; printer section is 86 mm inset. Feather embosses on printer-section side walls protrude 1 mm outward but do NOT extend the X bbox because they sit between x=10..11 (left) and x=97..98 (right), within the 0..108 shelf envelope.

Tray shortened from 41.6 to 21.6 mm exterior (interior 40→20 mm). Scoop and grip scallop removed — front wall is a plain vertical rectangle now. Enlarged owl face dominates the shorter front wall. Mesh Y max = 98.2 (wall at 94.2 + 4 mm pupil protrusion). Eye radius clamped from requested 10 mm to 9 mm so emboss top stays inside the 21.6 mm wall with ≥0.6 mm margin.

features.name: corner_feet
features.description: Four flat cylinder feet (8 mm dia × 3 mm tall). Plain cylinder(h=3, d=8) — flat top merges cleanly with base plate at z=0; flat bottom is a full 8 mm disc on the bed. REPLACES previous scaled-hemisphere dome feet, which created a problematic overhang under the base plate. No supports required.

features.name: base_plate
features.description: Stepped base plate: 86 mm wide at printer section (Y=0..149, X=11..97), widening via 45° chamfer (Y=149..160) to 108 mm wide shelf (Y=160..254.9). 4 mm thick. Four outer corners filleted r=6; chamfer endpoints also round.

features.name: low_perimeter_walls
features.description: Stepped 25 mm low bathtub wall. Printer section: 3 mm side/back/front walls around 80×154 mm pocket. Shelf section: 2.05 mm side walls flanking open-top/open-front tray slot. Top edge r=1.5 mm fillet via stacked quarter-round slices.

features.name: cable_slot
features.description: U-notch in back wall, 25 mm wide × 20 mm tall, centered at X=54. Open at z=0 (no bridge).

features.name: feather_embosses_left
features.description: Three half-ellipse arch embosses on the printer-section LEFT side wall exterior (x=11). Each 20 mm wide × 12 mm tall (flat top, domed underside), raised 1 mm proud. Y-centers at y≈34.5, 76, 117.5 (evenly spaced along y=3..149 with 4 equal gaps of 21.5 mm). Vertical center at z=14.5 (mid-height of the 4..25 mm wall). Extrudes outward on a vertical wall — no overhang, no supports required.

features.name: feather_embosses_right
features.description: Mirror of left: three half-ellipse arches on the printer-section RIGHT side wall exterior (x=97), same dimensions and placement.

features.name: tray_shelf_upper_walls
features.description: Short cap walls closing out the tray slot sides above the 25 mm low wall. Now just 1.3 mm tall (z=25..26.3) to match the new shorter slot interior (22.3 mm). Slot open at top and front.

features.name: tall_back_panel_body
features.description: Tall back panel z=0..145, 86 mm wide × 3 mm thick. Top edge r=1.5 mm fillet on long front/back edges via stacked slices.

features.name: ear_tuft_left
features.description: Left owl ear tuft — triangular profile extruded 3 mm. Base 25 mm along back panel top, peak at X=16, Z=180. 2 mm apex fillet.

features.name: ear_tuft_right
features.description: Right owl ear tuft — mirror of left. Peak at X=92, Z=180.

features.name: tray_shell
features.description: Open-top rectangular shell, 103.2 × 94.2 × 21.6 mm exterior with 3 mm vertical corner fillets. Walls 1.6 mm, floor 1.6 mm. Interior 100 × 91 × 20 mm. Plain vertical front wall — no scoop, no grip scallop.

features.name: beak_emboss
features.description: Downward-pointing triangular beak on front wall exterior, 8 mm wide × 8 mm tall, raised 2.5 mm. Top edge at z=9, apex at z=1 (near floor). Centered on X.

features.name: eye_emboss_left
features.description: Left owl eye — cylindrical disc r=9 mm, raised 2 mm proud of front wall. Center at (X=ext_w/2-22, Y=ext_d, Z=11). Eye radius clamped from specified 10 mm to 9 mm to fit vertically within the 21.6 mm front wall with safe margins.

features.name: eye_emboss_right
features.description: Right owl eye — symmetric to left. Center at (X=ext_w/2+22, Y=ext_d, Z=11).

features.name: pupil_emboss_left
features.description: Left pupil, concentric with left eye. r=4 mm, total +4 mm proud of wall (2 mm beyond eye disc).

features.name: pupil_emboss_right
features.description: Right pupil, concentric with right eye. r=4 mm, +4 mm total proud.

cradle.bed_face: base plate bottom via flat cylinder feet (8 mm disc contacts)
cradle.z_direction: +Z = up; ear tuft peaks at z=180, feet at z=-3..0

specDeviations.reason: Tray was shortened from 41.6 to 21.6 mm exterior per user direction; slot shrinks to match at 21.6 + 2×0.35 = 22.3 mm (sliding fit). Shelf upper walls now only 1.3 mm tall (z=25..26.3). Slot remains open top + open front.

User requested replacement to eliminate the overhang under the base plate that the scaled-hemisphere feet created. Flat-top, flat-bottom cylinders print with no supports and give a full 8 mm first-layer footprint.

specDeviations.actual: three half-ellipse feather embosses per side (1 mm proud, 20 w × 12 h mm)
specDeviations.reason: User requested 'cuteness features' on the printer-section side walls. Embosses are vertical-wall outward perimeter bumps — no overhang, no supports.
User feedback: 'front has a big hole in it, walls are too tall making it look goofy.' Interior halved from 40 to 20 mm. Scoop and top-edge grip scallop removed.

specDeviations.expected: 45° scoop on bottom 15 mm of front wall; 24×8 mm top-edge grip scallop
specDeviations.actual: both removed; front wall is a plain vertical rectangle
specDeviations.reason: Per user direction: shorter tray can be pinched from the sides, so grip scallop unneeded; scoop eliminated because removing the tall wall removes the need to scoop labels over its top.

User instruction explicitly allowed adjusting if eyes visually crowd. A r=10 mm eye centered at z=13 on a 21.6 mm wall would place the eye top at z=23, overshooting the wall top. Clamped to r=9 with eye_cz=11 so eye top sits at z=20 (0.6 mm below wall top) and eye bottom at z=2 (0.4 mm above floor). Beak (z=1..9) sits below pupils (z=7..15) but offset in X (±22 from centerline) so no collision.
Pupils now protrude +4 mm proud of front wall (up from +3 mm). Intentional aesthetic relief. Echoed envelope still reports 94.2 for validator comparison.

printability_notes: Cradle corner feet: flat cylinders (no overhang). Full 8 mm disc first-layer contact.
Cradle feather embosses: outward protrusions on vertical exterior walls. Each slicer layer adds a 1 mm perimeter bump — no overhang, no supports.
Cradle cable slot: U-notch open at z=0, eliminates bridge.
Cradle tray slot: open top, eliminates bridge. Now only 22.3 mm deep.
Tray: front wall is plain vertical; no overhangs from scoop geometry anymore.
Tray owl embosses: all features are outward protrusions on a vertical exterior wall — slicer handles as simple perimeters.
Both parts watertight and manifold per trimesh analysis.
1.5 mm top-edge fillets on low perimeter wall tops and back panel top preserved from prior iteration.
No bridges anywhere in the assembly.
